get.description:
Returns a single aggregated snapshot of the entire platform:
• **tenants** — counts by status (active / suspended / archived), newly registered this week, and subscriptions expiring this week
• **users** — total and active user counts across all tenants
• **remainders** — reminder delivery stats (sent, failed, skipped, pending) and the computed failure rate

This endpoint runs ~11 COUNT queries behind the scenes and should be cached or called sparingly.

200.description: Summary object containing tenants, users, and reminders sub-objects

GlobalTenantsSummaryResponse.description: Aggregated tenant counts grouped by status and time-based windows

active.description: Tenants with ACTIVE status and not deleted

suspended.description: Tenants with SUSPENDED status and not deleted

archived.description: Tenants with ARCHIVED status and not deleted

newThisWeek.description: Tenants created within the last 7 days (not archived)

expiringThisWeek.description: Active plan subscriptions expiring within the next 7 days

RemaindersSummary.description: Aggregate reminder delivery stats across all tenants

skipped.description: Reminders skipped (e.g. no active subscription at send time)

pending.description: Reminders not yet processed (sent_at is null)

overdue.description: Reminders past their expected delivery that are still pending (not yet implemented)

failureRate.description: Failure rate as a percentage = (failed / (sent + failed + skipped)) × 100

totalUsers.description: All non-deleted users across every tenant

activeUsers.description: Users with ACTIVE status and not deleted
